name: calendar_freebusy
description: Find free and busy time slots across one or more Google Calendars. Useful for scheduling meetings by identifying available windows.

start_time.description: Start of the time range to check in ISO 8601 format (e.g. '2026-03-22T09:00:00-07:00')

end_time.description: End of the time range to check in ISO 8601 format (e.g. '2026-03-22T17:00:00-07:00')

calendar_ids.description: List of calendar IDs to check (default: ['primary']). Use email addresses for shared calendars.

min_duration_minutes.description: Minimum free slot duration in minutes to include in results (default: 30)
